popularStory.headline: John Perry
popularStory.description: John Perry was born in November, 1604, and became a clothworker (member of Clothworkers Guild) and a citizen of London in November, 1728, the third year of the reign of Charles I.  He married Johan …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Perry於1604年11月出生在英國哈普爾法爾波洛時，他的父親Rev. John A or Harry Perry36歲，母親Judith Vassall37歲。他於大約1643年與Johanna Holland在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1674年12月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年70歲。

zh-hans.Toppsfield, Essex, England: 英国英格兰艾可托培斯費爾德
zh-hans.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Perry于1604年11月出生在英国哈普爾法爾波洛时，他的父亲Rev. John A or Harry Perry36岁，母亲Judith Vassall37岁。他于大约1643年与Johanna Holland在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1674年12月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Perry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Herry ‘son of Herry’, a variant of the personal name Harry (see Harris ).

English: topographic name for someone who lived near a pear tree (Middle English piri(e), peri(e), puri(e), Old English pirige, pyrige), or a habitational name for someone who owned or came from a place so named. This surname and a number of variants have been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

variants.name: Peery
meanings: Irish: variant of   Perry  , taken to Ireland at the time of thePlantation of Ulster and in the Cromwellian period.

variants.name: Pear
meanings: English: topographic name from residence by a pear tree (Middle English pere, Old English peru, pere). Compare Perry .
English: nickname from Middle English pere, Old French per, peer ‘peer or paragon’, also ‘companion’.

variants.name: Peary
meanings: History: Robert E. Peary (1856–1920) was a U.S.-born explorer, who in 1909 led the first successful expedition to the North Pole. Peary Land in the north of Greenland is named after him, as he explored there in 1892 and 1900.

variants.name: Perrie
meanings: Scottish: variant of Perry 2. Alternatively, perhaps from the Old French personal name Pierre; see Pierce .

variants.name: Harris
meanings: English (southern England and south Wales): from the personal name Harry + genitival -s. This surname is also established in Ireland, taken there principally during the Plantation of Ulster. However, in some cases, particularly in families coming from County Mayo, Harris can be an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarchadha. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

American shortened and altered form of Greek surnames begining with Cha(r)-, such as Chasandrinos (variant of Kassandrinos, a habitational name from the Kassandra peninsula of Chalkidiki), and various patronymics from the personal name Charalampos (see Charos ). In North America, the surname Harris may possibly also originate from a transferred use of the Greek personal (given) name Charis or Harris (shortened forms of Charalampos) as a surname (i.e. as a replacement of the original surname).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Perryman
meanings: English (Devon): elaborated form of Perry , with Middle English man, probably denoting one who lived near a pear tree; see Pearman .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Perry was born in November 1604, in Farnborough, Hampshire, England, his father, Rev. John A or Harry Perry, was 36 and his mother, Judith Vassall, was 37. He married Johanna Holland about 1643, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 13 December 1674, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Perry est né en novembre 1604, à Farnborough, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Rev. John A or Harry Perry, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Judith Vassall, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Holland environ 1643, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 13 décembre 1674, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 70 ans.

Er hat um 1643 in England Johanna Holland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. ko.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운
ko.lifeSummary: John Perry(이)가 1604년 11월 영국 함프실르 패른버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rev. John A or Harry Perry(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Judith Vassall(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1643년 영국에서 Johanna Holland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1674년 12월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Johanna Holland aproximadamente 1643, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. ru.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Perry родился ноябрь 1604 г. в местности фарнбороую, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Rev. John A or Harry Perry было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Judith Vassall, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Holland около 1643 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 13 декабря 1674 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 70 лет.
